title: clerodendrum boivinii
intro: Clerodendrum boivinii, also known as the pink butterfly bush, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Clerodendrum boivinii has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Clerodendrum boivinii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
